privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic tide data for Cape Cod, MA covering March 18-25, 2024 (28 total tide events: 14 low, 14 high). Ground truth analysis confirms: 14 low tides total, 7 in daylight (7 AM - 6:59 PM based on verifier implementation), and 7 meeting all criteria (daylight + height ≤1.5 ft). The verifier expects height threshold of ≤1.5 feet and daylight window using hour >= 7 and hour < 19. A discrepancy exists: documentation states 'March 18-25' which spans 8 calendar dates but claims only '7 days', and documentation states '7:00 AM - 7:00 PM' but implementation uses 7 AM - 6:59 PM (excluding 7 PM).
